name: Cheese Latkes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound cottage cheese, dry curd, or farmer cheese
3 tablespoons matzo meal, or wheat bran
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together until smooth.
2. Spray a non-stick griddle or skillet with vegetable cooking spray.
3. Drop batter by large spoonfuls onto the hot griddle.
4. Cook until browned on the bottom; turn over and cook the other side.
